title: Department Manager Vacancy at Guardian Pharmacy - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Guardian Pharmacy - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Guardian Pharmacy in Mysuru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Guardian Pharmacy:
Guardian Pharmacy is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Guardian Pharmacy!
